claims.text: Multi-model deliberation improves reasoning quality by reducing individual model blind spots.
claims.reason: Studies show ensemble methods outperform single models in reasoning tasks

claims.text: The system can handle up to 10 concurrent research runs without performance degradation.
claims.reason: Load testing showed linear scaling up to 10 concurrent runs

claims.text: Evidence auditing can improve the quality of research outputs.
claims.reason: Peer review literature supports auditing for quality improvement

claims.text: Local-first architecture reduces operational costs for individual researchers.
claims.reason: No cloud egress or compute costs for local inference

claims.text: The API should use WebSocket for real-time event streaming.
claims.reason: User feedback indicated polling was suboptimal

hypotheses.statement: Ensemble deliberation produces more reliable decisions than single-model review
hypotheses.whyItMatters: Determines whether multi-model architecture is justified

hypotheses.statement: Automated evidence auditing reduces human reviewer workload by 60%

openQuestions: How does the system handle conflicting evidence sources?
What is the optimal number of models for cost-benefit trade-off?
Can the system be extended to support domain-specific models?
